recommendations.title: Alice in Wonderland
recommendations.overview: On a golden afternoon, wildly curious young Alice tumbles into the burrow and enters the merry, madcap world of Wonderland full of whimsical escapades.
recommendations.director: Clyde Geronimi, Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson

recommendations.title: Peter Pan
recommendations.overview: Leaving the safety of their nursery behind, Wendy, Michael and John follow Peter Pan to a magical world where childhood lasts forever. But while in Neverland, the kids must face Captain Hook and foil his attempts to get rid of Peter for good.
recommendations.director: Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson, Clyde Geronimi

recommendations.title: Cinderella
recommendations.overview: Cinderella has faith her dreams of a better life will come true. With help from her loyal mice friends and a wave of her Fairy Godmother's wand, Cinderella's rags are magically turned into a glorious gown and off she goes to the Royal Ball. But when
recommendations.director: Clyde Geronimi, Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson

recommendations.title: One Hundred and One Dalmatians
recommendations.overview: When a litter of dalmatian puppies are abducted by the minions of Cruella De Vil, the parents must find them before she uses them for a diabolical fashion statement.
recommendations.director: Hamilton Luske, Clyde Geronimi, Wolfgang Reitherman

recommendations.title: The Ugly Duckling
recommendations.overview: An outcast duckling's search for a family to accept him leads to constant rejection before learning his true identity as a swan.
recommendations.director: Hamilton Luske, Clyde Geronimi, Jack Cutting

recommendations.title: Melody Time
recommendations.overview: In the grand tradition of Disney's great musical classics, Melody Time features seven timeless stories, each enhanced with high-spirited music and unforgettable characters. You'll be sure to tap your toes and clap your hands in this witty feast for t
recommendations.director: Jack Kinney, Clyde Geronimi, Wilfred Jackson, Hamilton Luske

recommendations.title: Fantasia
recommendations.overview: Walt Disney's timeless masterpiece is an extravaganza of sight and sound! See the music come to life, hear the pictures burst into song and experience the excitement that is Fantasia over and over again.
recommendations.director: Jim Handley, James Algar, Norman Ferguson, Bill Roberts, Ben Sharpsteen, David Hand, Paul Satterfield, Wilfred Jackson, Ford Beebe Jr., Hamilton Luske, T. Hee, Samuel Armstrong

recommendations.title: Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: When the gentle woodcarver Geppetto builds a marionette to be his substitute son, a benevolent fairy brings the toy to life. The puppet, named Pinocchio, is not yet a human boy. He must earn the right to be real by proving that he is brave, truthful,
recommendations.director: Norman Ferguson, Wilfred Jackson, Bill Roberts, Jack Kinney, T. Hee, Ben Sharpsteen, Hamilton Luske

recommendations.title: Modern Times
recommendations.overview: A bumbling tramp desires to build a home with a young woman, yet is thwarted time and time again by his lack of experience and habit of being in the wrong place at the wrong time..

recommendations.title: Make Mine Music
recommendations.overview: In the tradition of Fantasia, Make Mine Music is a glorious collection of musically charged animated shorts featuring such fun-filled favorites as "Peter and the Wolf", narrated by the beloved voice behind Winnie the Pooh. In addition you'll enjoy su
recommendations.director: Hamilton Luske, Jack Kinney, Robert Cormack, Clyde Geronimi, Joshua Meador
